'''Rya''' was a celestial body<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> situated in the [[Rya system/Legends|Rya system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cinto Alaras]]. He went on to study at the [[Carosi XII Academy of Medicine]] on<ref name="AIR" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|109|Carosi XII}}</ref> [[Carosi XII]] of<ref name="AIR" /> the neighboring<ref name="OuterRim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-outer-rim-sectors|text=The Essential Atlas Extra: Outer Rim Sectors|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Nembus sector/Legends|Nembus sector]],<ref name="EAOC Carosi">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Carosus system]]</ref> from which he eventually received a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor's]] degree seven [[Standard month/Legends|standard months]] prior to a point<ref name="AIR" /> in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Rya was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Rya [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square P-4.<ref name="TEA" />
